title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Data Exfiltration via OneDrive/Graph API
description: Detects non-OneDrive processes uploading data to Microsoft Graph API. BLUELIGHT exfiltrates screenshots, credentials, and system data via OneDrive uploads.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = 3 and 'Destination Hostname' like '%graph.microsoft.com%' and not ('Process Name' like '%OneDrive.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%Teams.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%OUTLOOK.EXE') | stats count as Connections, sum('Bytes Sent') as TotalUpload by 'Process Name', 'Source IP', 'Host Name (Server)' | sort -TotalUpload
falsepositives: Custom applications using Microsoft Graph API for file uploads
splunk_original: index=sysmon EventCode=3 DestinationHostname="graph.microsoft.com" NOT Image IN ("*onedrive.exe","*teams.exe","*outlook.exe") | stats sum(bytes_out) as TotalUpload by Image, SourceIp | where TotalUpload > 5000000 | sort - TotalUpload
